Parallelized the int8 first-pass (~2.4x at 4 threads vs f32's ~1.4x plateau), skipped the global row-sort on the parallel path (per-chunk sort instead), and made the scan floor dim-aware (rows*dim work). bench-crit parallel_search extended to sweep the quant path.

Shipped: model::Quantization + store::QuantState + two-pass search_quantized (int8 first pass → f32 rerank), since extended with incremental upsert (0.6.1) and parallel int8 first pass (0.7.1). Stale claim.

Implemented: Ne/NotIn + Lt/Le/Gt/Ge predicates with same-type orderable comparison (value_cmp) and a consistent present-key rule. Pure-logic/Miri-clean, flows through CLI+server via serde. PR #12.

Exposed Config::ann through the cli feature: --ann <hnsw|ivf> plus per-knob flags (--ann-m/-ef-construction/-ef-search/-n-lists/-n-probe/-overscan/-seed) on the shared StoreArgs, so every store-opening command (incl. serve) can build/consult the index. ANN is open-time config (not in the header), so it's passed per open. Active config echoed via GET /stats and nidus stats through a shared AnnDto (server/dto.rs). Tests + docs (cli-and-server, http-server) updated; version 0.12.1.

ANN exact-prefilter for selective filters (read.rs search_ann) + store/mod.rs split into scoring/quant/read/write/tests submodules; CLAUDE.md gains a 'keep files focused' convention. just ci + ci-cli + miri all green.

ANN exact-prefilter for selective filters (read.rs search_ann) + store/mod.rs split into scoring/quant/read/write/tests submodules; CLAUDE.md gains a 'keep files focused' convention. just ci + ci-cli + miri all green.

Quantized ANN walk + f32 rerank: lifted ann/quant mutual-exclusion; Walk abstraction scores int8/binary codes during HNSW build+search and IVF list scans (centroids stay f32), store reranks candidates exactly. Cache validity keyed on quant kind. Shipped in 0.13.0.

Deduped via logic, not a fat trait: the real shared code — the index_cache codec (nidus-b6i.1) and the persist gating (persist_index → persist_ann/persist_fts behind one in-memory/read-only guard) — is factored into one source. The remaining ANN/FTS lifecycle bodies are genuinely different (vector/row-keyed vs id/attrs-keyed); a unifying SecondaryIndex trait would be a fat interface each impl half-ignores and would churn shipped ANN for no real dedup. Per user direction (don't make it fat to be fat).
All children complete: shared index_cache codec, optional vectors, FTS core (analyzer+BM25), store wiring, text_search, hybrid (RRF), fts cache, CLI+server, docs+0.14.0. Shipped in PR #25.
Closed

Phase 1 keystone shipped in a9a1c45: trait surface + LocalFs/LocalRam + URL-scheme selection. Deeper data/log/index_cache wiring + snapshot-through-Persistence split into nidus-vnu (gated on a remote backend existing).

Shipped: the live store now runs over the Persistence backend. data/log are FileAppenders from Persistence::appender (new Appender::read_exact_at keeps DataSegment::open streaming, no 2x peak); ann/fts caches go through index_cache over Persistence get/put; writer lock via try_lock. MemAppender backs in-memory stores. Appender/BackendLock are Send+Sync so Store stays Arc<RwLock>-shareable. All 372 lib + 12 integ tests green, Miri clean, ci-cli 393. No new deps.

Shipped: backup/restore route through Persistence. --out/--in are object locations (open_object_location splits root+key); backup reads source data/log via the backend and PUTs the in-memory tar.gz; restore GETs it and PUTs objects into the target. file:// + bare paths work now, s3:// ready. New backend::open_object_location + data::header_from_bytes. ci-cli 395 green, miri clean.

Shipped: src/backend/gcs.rs — Gcs Persistence (get/put/delete/list) over sans-IO tame-gcs + tame-oauth service-account JWT (RSA via ring), executed through cloud::Http. gs://bucket[/prefix] (alias gcs://) wired into open_persistence; creds from GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS[_JSON]. Construction-tested (name/object_id/try_lock + dummy provider); Miri-clean; ci 379, ci-cli 401. NOT round-trip-verified here (no clean mock for the fixed OAuth token endpoint) — verify against a real bucket out of band.

Both S3 (a9..) and GCS (this) persistence backends shipped as whole-object Persistence impls (snapshot/whole-object use; appender=None, no live-append-backing). Deps in default build; build 7s; positioning updated. Live-on-cloud append-backing was never in scope (it's the heavy O(store) mode).

Implemented: Redis/Valkey/KeyDB/Dragonfly memory tier (RedisTier) wired e2e (publish-on-flush, adopt-on-open); live S3/GCS backing via ObjectAppender + advisory lock; CLI --persistence/--memory; backup/restore over any backend. Tests (incl. Miri-clean in-RAM e2e + RESP mock) green.

Implemented: Redis/Valkey/KeyDB/Dragonfly memory tier (RedisTier) wired e2e (publish-on-flush, adopt-on-open); live S3/GCS backing via ObjectAppender + advisory lock; CLI --persistence/--memory; backup/restore over any backend. Tests (incl. Miri-clean in-RAM e2e + RESP mock) green.

Phase 1 shipped: segment format + manifest + WAL→segment seal + transparent legacy migration; brute-force/quant/ANN unchanged via dense global row space; just ci + miri + ci-cli all green

Phase 2 shipped: per-segment IVF over immutable cold segments + exhaustive active/small-segment tail, opt-in via Config::segment_index_min_rows (default off → fully exact). Fan-out search merges brute-force tail + per-segment IVF walks into one exact-reranked top-k; shared offer_candidates dedupes the candidate-resolution logic with the global ANN path. Reuses ivf.rs. just ci (420) + ci-cli (442) + miri + docs all green. Deferred follow-ups (cache persistence, parallel/quantized per-segment walks, tuning, background merge) filed separately.

Phase 3 built: per-segment mmap (Config::mmap, default off). Immutable sealed segments served read-only from a memory-map (DataSegment::open_mmap + Backing::Mmap), active segment stays RAM; the single Mmap::map is the crate's only unsafe (#![deny(unsafe_code)] + one scoped #[allow]), byte→f32 via safe bytemuck cast. Local-FS + little-endian + sealed-segments only; results identical to RAM path (parity test), composes with per-segment IVF + quant; compaction reopens a mapped base writable. just ci (428 lib) + ci-cli (450) + miri + docs all green; build 8.5s. Follow-ups filed separately.
